title: Error in Code Node Execution
symptom: When executing the Code node, a red line error appears, indicating an issue with the code. However, it does not affect the overall execution.
applies_when: No trigger node attached before execution
not_this_if: Trigger node is attached before running the workflow
root_cause: The error occurs because the Code node is executed without a preceding trigger node, which is necessary for the workflow to run correctly. The absence of a trigger node leads to undefined input for the Code node.
fix_steps: Attach a trigger node before the Code node
Ensure the workflow is properly configured to execute with the trigger
agent_instruction: Attach a trigger node before the Code node to resolve the execution error.
